invariant: BF4 — feature must not break an existing AC (scoped regression guard)
seed: (authoritative rejecting output of running VERIFY-OUTPUT clean-room on the regressed tree) = defects/regression/verify-output.blocked.json → .build/slices/S5/verify-output.json
load_bearing_assertion: VERIFY-OUTPUT verdict == 'blocked' (regression layer RED on AC6, escape route DIAGNOSE). Golden verdict == 'verified' (regression green).
separates_from_golden_by: regression.verdict (green in golden / red here) — the REAL invariant under test, not a cosmetic difference.
e2e_validated: 2026-06-10 — clean-room step-runner ran prompts/04-build/VERIFY-OUTPUT.md against the regressed bench → verdict 'blocked', regression red on AC6 (cascade to AC11/AC13). Golden bench → 'verified'. Oracle separates.
